hero.title: Emergency Contacts Organizer
hero.description: Keep important family, medical, school, workplace, insurance, and assistance contacts in one protected workspace.

flow.title: Contacts → Categories → Insights
steps: Create important contacts with phone, email, location, and notes
Group records by family, medical, police, fire, school, insurance, and custom categories
Review favourites, primary contacts, and coverage gaps

differences.title: Important contacts without scattered notes
differences.description: Emergency Contacts Organizer keeps user-entered contact information findable while staying clear about its limits.

items.title: Fast lookup
items.description: Favourite and primary contacts surface first, with direct phone and email actions where available.

items.title: Useful grouping
items.description: Default and custom categories help families, residents, and travellers organize practical contact lists.

items.title: Responsible boundary
items.description: The app organizes information but does not contact emergency services or guarantee emergency assistance.

feel.title: A calm place for urgent-reference information
feel.description: The workflow keeps the contact list simple, readable, and mobile-friendly.

items.title: Start with contacts
items.description: Add names, relationships, phone numbers, email, location, priority, and notes.

items.title: Group what matters
items.description: Use categories for family, medical, public-safety, school, workplace, insurance, roadside, and other contacts.

items.title: Review readiness
items.description: Use insights to spot favourites, primary contacts, and records missing helpful details.

audiences.title: Who uses Emergency Contacts Organizer
audiences.description: Useful for people who want important contact information kept together without turning Ansiversa into an emergency-response service.

items.title: Parents and families
items.description: Keep family, school, caregiver, and medical contacts in one place.

items.title: Residents
items.description: Save local police, fire, roadside, insurance, and building support contacts for reference.

items.title: Travellers
items.description: Organize assistance numbers, insurance contacts, and important local details before a trip.

resourceSection.title: Contact details that are useful under pressure
resourceSection.description: Each record keeps the practical information users are likely to need when searching quickly.

items.title: Phone and email
items.description: Primary and alternate phone fields plus optional email support quick manual contact.

items.title: Relationship and category
items.description: Labels make it clear why the contact matters.

items.title: Location and notes
items.description: Optional address, country or region, and instructions capture important context.

groupedSection.title: Organize, mark, and review
groupedSection.description: The app focuses on private recordkeeping and quick reference.

items.name: Contacts
items.description: Create, edit, delete, search, filter, and open contact details.

items.name: Categories
items.description: Use seeded groups or add custom groups for household needs.

items.name: Favourites
items.description: Mark frequently needed contacts and surface them first.

items.name: Insights
items.description: Review totals, category coverage, favourites, and records missing useful information.

technicalSection.title: Aligned with the Ansiversa platform model
technicalSection.description: Emergency Contacts Organizer follows protected mini-app routing, isolated API data, and generated frontend contracts.
items: Owner-scoped backend records in isolated app tables.

finalCta.title: Open Emergency Contacts Organizer
finalCta.description: Start with contacts, then organize categories and review quick-access coverage.
